author: Gabriel T.
pros: The software is easy to use, well organised and the overall functionality is impressive.
cons: The only setback with this software is for you to use the app effectively you must pay more.

description: It has been an easy to use product that meets our needs.
author: Crystal H.
pros: I like the functionality of running payroll.
cons: Not being able to customize forms inside of Eddy.

review_title: EDDY is a great starter HRMS system
description: The customer service team is amazing - always very responsive.
author: Angie C.
pros: Our company had paper files before - Moving to an online HRMS has been so helpful
cons: It would be nice to notify employees when their licenses expire. Currently the way Eddy has it set up, you have to create a training. It would be great to have a calendar of dates to notify employees of deadlines.

author: Lauren L.
pros: The best feature of eddy is the fact that it is almost an one stop shop. Everything you need is obtained through the eddy portal. The software is easy to use and easy to train.
cons: I would like to see a org chart build out, more time reporting options and full payroll integration.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Eddy has been great to use. Its nice to have a central location where I can see, and others can see the bigger picture.
author: Marissa B.
pros: Eddy is easy to use and has everything that I need to see as an employee about my employment in one place.
cons: I don't have anything major I don't like about eddy. it works great. I dont use it on the daily, but when i need a document or have to do something, it is nice to know wher eI can go.

description: One main place to organize all employees and keep things running smoothly. I would highly recommend for the simple reason that they are willing to work and grow with our company.
author: Viktorija M.
pros: Customer support is absolutely excellent, quick responses and always helpful. Any extra functions not offered, they are willing to add and constantly update the software to meet our company needs.
cons: I would like to have more editing abilities for individual job postings.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very good. Our support person is outstanding.
author: John T.
pros: It is relatively simple and straight forward. I learned from it and it helps us stay compliant
cons: I can't think of any negatives. It just works well for our business and staff.

description: I have been really happy with the Eddy program. Eddy has helped me to keep our employees up to date on the documents required for our licensing. Eddy is a good source for our employees to find the documents they need for their jobs and referral. We have used Eddy for hiring, it has streamlined that process and saved us a lot time.
author: Suzanne W.
pros: One of the features I like most about the software, is the onboarding for new employees. I love that I can send an invitation with a welcoming message and all the paperwork needed for our new hires. I have heard from our new hires that it was so easy to get their paperwork finished and at their own time. I like that I can track how far along the new hire is, in the onboarding experience.
cons: One of the things I think could be improved in the software is searching the employee database. When I have to look up multiple employee profiles for information, I have to return to the 'People' tab and scroll back to the top of the list to search again.

review_title: Great for small to medium business
description: Overall the experience has been great. Our company had explosive growth and I would not have been able to manage everything. It has met my expectations as a full-service HRIS.
author: Carol G.
pros: I like the full functionality of the software and that it's very easy to use. It's great for smaller or medium size businesses. I like the hiring, onboarding, people management and document filing. We recently implemented the payroll.
cons: I wish it had a messaging function and ability to track more than 2 PTO categories. I would also like to be able to have direct access to the payroll functionality if I need it. I would like more and customized reports.

author: Dave M.
pros: It works... We don't have problems.. I like products that do their job
cons: Don't have complaints at the moment. Will update if needed

description: I have had a great experience overall. The Eddy team has been quick to respond to my questions and concerns.
author: Ricky H.
pros: I like the profiles of the employees! It is fantastic to have access to this data and so easy to digest it.
cons: I wish there was more reproting. I also wish there was a way to reward employees through the portal. Payroll exposure is an issue. Getting pay stubs. Also getting out of state Tax stuff set up has been a pain.

review_title: Eddy Saved Me Time and Money
description: The salesperson was super friendly and I even got to talk to the CEO while trying to decide on the product. They showed me the roadmap of what they were going to roll out and they have been incredible each time. They keep me up to date on all the new features.
author: Marissa D.
pros: I really like being able to customize my candidate pipeline with the drag and drop features. Then I can also make job postings and save them in Eddy while at the same time putting through integrated top job boards like Glassdoor and Indeed. It makes it so much easier to track my candidates especially with being able to keep my notes right there in Eddy.
cons: I wish it had a couple more features like payroll and trainings already.

author: Becca W.
pros: This product is very easy to use. The layout is clean, simple, and the best part is it helps you stay organized. Very useful if you have a team with the information you need/want to document on them, and to view when employees are out for the month to help prepare ahead of time. Interviews and hiring goes more smoothly, and you can be sure candidates are always updated. and taken care of.
cons: Not at this time! Everyone has been super helpful.

review_title: THE HR Software for Modern Companies
description: There is no better software for interviewing and hiring. I have only been using Eddy for a short time, but I’m convinced.
author: Carlie P.
pros: The hiring process created by Eddy HR is unmatched. The software is easy to use and organized perfectly.
cons: Eddy is a newer software and not all of the features for employee management have launched. Once they do, the “cons” section will be empty. Eddy is straight up phenomenal.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Eddy is a great product that is priced right and full of capabilities!
author: McKenna G.
pros: Easy to use, Great Stage Actions, Free Interview Questions, Customizable, Auto Email Generation, Modern look and feel!
cons: I have no issues with Eddy. When I come across a bug their service team and software engineers get it fixed within a day. All around great people and even better customer service.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Tyler H.
pros: And incredible company was absolutely incredible customer service. Can’t believe the difference that it’s made having their HR software!
cons: Love everything about the product. No complaints whatsoever. They have delivered and continue to do so!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We have been using Eddy for 3 years now and the experience blew our previous company out of the water when it comes to user friendly and quick response time with support when needed.
author: Kayli P.
pros: I love that Eddy is set up clean and simple. Very user friendly!
cons: Doesnt integrate with another platform we use for keeping track of our tech's utilization.

review_title: Eddy.Com - An Exemplary Customer Service Experience
description: As a customer of Eddy.com, I have consistently been impressed by their exceptional customer service. The team they have assembled at Eddy is everything you would hope to find as a customer - polite, friendly and relatable, all while maintaining a professional profile. When team members who are well-versed and knowledgeable, whether the topic be technical or business-related(ie., navigating the online platform/app and onboarding guidance), are confident while also maintaining a high level of approachability, it creates an environment where customers feel supported, valued, and empowered to effectively address any challenges. Whatever your goal is, it's Eddy's goal, and there's a whole team of people to back you up and help you get there!
author: Anna S.
pros: -Customer Service -Availability -All-In-One onboarding system
cons: While my experience with Eddy.com has been overwhelmingly positive, it would be an added bonus if certain featuers of their platform which are not relevant to my needs (ie., payroll and hours) could be removed with an interface customization option.

review_title: great hris that allows contractor only and custom onboarding
author: Saad M.
pros: great hris that allows contractor only and custom onboarding. great pricing
cons: unexpected billing practices at year end

review_title: Great product for a good price!
description: Even more than the product itself, the EddyHR team has been incredible! They are so responsive, professional, friendly, and I trust 100% that they are here to help me the best they can. Having a great specialist at EddyHR who is available any time on any day to answer my questions is so great!!
author: Kayla A.
pros: EddyHR has been very easy to use for recruiting and employee management, as well as time and PTO tracking, and document retention. For the price, we couldn't have asked for a better starter HR platform for our small compan
cons: While EddyHR is a great platform, I do wish there were a few more features available. The features currently in place on the platform are good enough for now, but it takes a lot of leg work on the back-end since I can't customize it exactly to my specific needs. I wish it was built out a little more, and more easily customizable to my company's specific processes. But again, for the price I can't complain! I use this system every single day and it does get the job done well.

review_title: I'm new to HR, so EddyHR has made my HR role easy
description: What I like best is the customer service. Once we signed on, we were immediately assigned a rep that is always there to answer questions and help me walk me through new functions. The other great feature is the ability to access EddyHR's HR Support Center which is a great resource for all things HR - it's easy to ask a question of the HR Concierge, or scan the state-specific laws, tools, and videos. This has been great since I'm not a HR profession by trade.
author: Adriana L.
pros: EddyHR is user friendly, clean, not cluttered, and has the features that we needed the most - time tracking, time off management, important document management/storage. It has a simple employee portal that's easy to use.
cons: The software is fairly new so there are some features that haven't been rolled out yet like ability to have more than one vacation policy. It's not a big deal since I know more is to come and I already love what I see.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It's been frustrating at times but most of the time does what we need it to.
author: Seth R.
pros: It works well and gets the basic functions done at a lower cost of other systems.
cons: The reporting is tricky and doesn't always get what we want how we need it. It also doesn't handle rehires very well. When we rehire someone it overwrites their previous work data and that data is lost.

description: I appreciate the availability of the technical staff and training. Eddy is always improving the product to better meet our needs. I am very happy with the program
author: Wendy J.
pros: **Having our employee documents digitally stored and easy to access. **I love the ability to email a form for review and signature to our employees. **Tracking hours for Payroll **New employee onboarding is much easier **Advertising for new employees is coordinated with Job search sites **Training tracking and much more
cons: It took me some time to adjust to a new program

description: Eddy's team from beginning to end has been phenomenal.
author: Julie L.
pros: Installing and getting employees used to a new software is challenging, but Eddy's team were amazing. They have continued to help us through the process and as a new team ourselves, they've been patient and helpful when we have shifted our needs during the process.
cons: There's still some future functionality I wish was available now, the challenge of having future leave taken out prior to it being earned and balances has been tricky, but in general, the system is solid and super helpful.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Our companies overall experience with Eddy has been a very positive one. Although they are missing a few software details, they have gone above and beyond in meeting our companies very personalized needs. They have been great to work with, and we plan to continue using their product.
author: Morgan B.
pros: This product is very easy to use and understand. The customer support for this product has been excellent. The integration into this product was very smooth.
cons: This product is not completely integrated with their payroll product they offer. We would also like to see more reporting options.
